arguments.query: SELECT gmap_id, name, hours, state FROM business_description WHERE hours IS NOT NULL
SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) as avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY gmap_id

messages.content:
Question: What are the top 5 businesses that remain open after 6:00 PM on at least one weekday, ranked by highest average rating? Include their names, operating hours, and average ratings.

Available databases: review_database, googlelocal_db

Available schema:
Database: review_database (sqlite)
  Table: review — name, time, rating, text, gmap_id
Database: googlelocal_db (postgres)
  Table: business_description — name, gmap_id, description, num_of_reviews, hours, MISC, state

Question: What are the top 5 businesses that remain open after 6:00 PM on at least one weekday, ranked by highest average rating? Include their names, operating hours, and average ratings.

Available databases: review_database, googlelocal_db

Available schema:
Database: review_database (sqlite)
  Table: review — name, time, rating, text, gmap_id
Database: googlelocal_db (postgres)
  Table: business_description — name, gmap_id, description, num_of_reviews, hours, MISC, state

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"query_type": "sql", "database": "googlelocal_db", "query": "SELECT gmap_id, name, hours, state FROM business_description WHERE hours IS NOT NULL"}

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"query": "SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) as avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY gmap_id", "database": "review_database", "query_type": "sql"}

Question: What are the top 5 businesses that remain open after 6:00 PM on at least one weekday, ranked by highest average rating? Include their names, operating hours, and average ratings.

Available databases: review_database, googlelocal_db

Available schema:
Database: review_database (sqlite)
  Table: review — name, time, rating, text, gmap_id
Database: googlelocal_db (postgres)
  Table: business_description — name, gmap_id, description, num_of_reviews, hours, MISC, state

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"query_type": "sql", "database": "googlelocal_db", "query": "SELECT gmap_id, name, hours, state FROM business_description WHERE hours IS NOT NULL"}

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"query": "SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) as avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY gmap_id", "database": "review_database", "query_type": "sql"}

messages.content:
Question: What are the top 5 businesses that remain open after 6:00 PM on at least one weekday, ranked by highest average rating? Include their names, operating hours, and average ratings.

Available databases: review_database, googlelocal_db

Available schema:
Database: review_database (sqlite)
  Table: review — name, time, rating, text, gmap_id
Database: googlelocal_db (postgres)
  Table: business_description — name, gmap_id, description, num_of_reviews, hours, MISC, state

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"query_type": "sql", "database": "googlelocal_db", "query": "SELECT gmap_id, name, hours, state FROM business_description WHERE hours IS NOT NULL"}

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"query": "SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) as avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY gmap_id", "database": "review_database", "query_type": "sql"}
